description: FRONTIER: one extractor null-guards an optional-join field; siblings read mandatory fields. v0.1 detects only sort-divergence, so it misses this.
inspired_by: Null-pointer regressions from deduplicating defensive and non-defensive field access

findings.rationale: extractManager guards against a null manager because profile.manager comes from an optional join; extractName and extractEmail read mandatory fields and skip the guard. Unify the three and the guard is dropped — a production NPE on every contractor or top-level record. A null-handling detector should flag the divergent guard; v0.1 (sort-only) cannot.
